title: Search in Comment Bubble using a field or magnify glass

posts.author: sswale (Sandra Swale)
posts.cookedHtml:
To search in Comment Bubble
Currently you have to know to use Ctrl+F to search in the comment bubble.
Which opens up a box in upper right, enter search info and it will let you know how many items it found, use arrow up/down and see highlighted search in comments. Great feature, but for our users, it is not obvious.

Why can’t you add a search field or magnify glass?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
